title: Antibookban
description: The use of the book is run at the same time as the antibookban kit
body:
# Antibookban
# 中文
你是否在为服务器有人制作禁人书和禁人盒感到烦恼，而市面上的插件只会禁止书的使用，却无法在反禁人书和书的正常使用直接取得平衡。我们的插件既保证书可以正常使用，也可以保证能尽最大程度防止使用禁人盒破坏服务器。我们的插件是各大无政府服务器服主的福音，在使用插件后，成书无法放入潜影盒中，即使原来的潜影盒有成书也会被删除，无法通过漏斗向潜影盒放入成书，从而一定程度上杜绝了禁人盒的产生。
# 目前支持的版本
【✔】paper1.12.2

【✔】paper1.21.3
# 目前的缺陷(带√的问题已修复)
【✔】可以通过漏斗将成书传入潜影盒

【✔】打开潜影盒后成书不会删除，只有关闭潜影盒后才会删除成书

【✖】以前包含成书的潜影盒在容器或转移时不会清除成书

【✖】挖掘潜影盒后的掉落物或掉落物进入玩家背包时不会清除里面的成书
# English
Are you troubled by the creation of ban books and ban boxes on your server? Existing plugins only block the use of books, but fail to strike a balance between preventing them and ensuring their normal use. Our plugin ensures that books can be used normally while minimizing the risk of ban boxes disrupting the server. Our plugin is a boon for anarchist server owners. After using this plugin, written books cannot be placed into shulker boxes. Even if a shulker box already contains a written book, it will be deleted. This prevents the hopper from adding a written book to the shulker box, thus preventing the creation of ban boxes.
# Currently Supported Versions
【✔】 Paper 1.12.2

【✔】 Paper 1.21.3
# Current Bugs (Issues marked with a √ have been fixed)
【✔】 Written books can be transferred to shulker boxes via hoppers

【✔】 Written books are not deleted after opening a shulker box; they are only deleted after closing the box.

【✖】 Previously, shulker boxes containing written books were not deleted when placed in containers or transferred.

【✖】 Written books are not deleted when dropped from a shulker box or when the dropped items are placed in the player's inventory.
# Github
paper1.12.2:`https://github.com/Andy-177/Antibookban-Lowv`

paper1.21.3:`https://github.com/Andy-177/Antibookban-Higtv`
